title: Roleplay Mod
body:
![https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minewache_Mod/BH_Minewache_Mod_header.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minewache_Mod/BH_Minewache_Mod_header.webp "https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Minewache_Mod/BH_Minewache_Mod_header.webp")

## Minewache Roleplay Mod (Minecraft 1.12.2)

#

**In Development: A comprehensive role-playing mod for Minecraft 1.12.2!**

(Important: The listed features are a high‑level overview. If you have questions, feel free to ask.)

## Dependencies and Optional Components
- Optional dependencies:
  - DynamX (For Garage System and more..)
  - ACs-GUIs (GUI framework (Curently only needed if you Install DynamX))
  - MySQL Connector/J (database connectivity)
- Behavior when missing:
  - The mod will NOT crash
  - Vehicle commands and DynamX‑based features are disabled when DynamX is not installed
  - Advanced ACs‑GUIs interfaces are disabled or fall back to vanilla-style UIs when ACs‑GUIs is not installed
  - Database features (IDs, economy, garage persistence) are disabled when MySQL driver is missing or MySQL is turned off in config
  - Clear warning messages are logged at startup to indicate which features are disabled
- Recommended (optional): [Custom Player Models](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models)


## Dependencies:
[DynamX](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamx), [ACsGuis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/acsguis), [MySQL JDBC](https://modrinth.com/plugin/mysql-jdbc), [Custom Player Models](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models)

**MySQL Integration for Advanced Features:**
- Identification system for identity verification (in development).
- Economy system with accounts and money transactions.
- Police database and police system (in development).

**Configurable Mod Settings:**
- Customize the broadcast prefix to suit your needs.
- Determine the colors of mod outputs in chat.
- Option to use MySQL for data and economy functions.

**Job System for Versatile Opportunities:**
- Easily create in-game jobs.
- Define ranks and salaries in-game.

**Vehicle System for Authentic Role-Playing:**
- Utilize CarSpawner and garages for vehicle management with the DynamX mod.

**Kit system**

**RP Commands:**
- Use /ooc and /oocglobal for out-of-character messages.

**Useful Player Commands:**
- Utilize commands such as /gm, /fly, /heal, /ooc, /tpa, and many more to enhance your gameplay.

**Planned Features:**
- Routing system for more diversity and exploration (planned).
- House system to make your home part of the role-playing experience (in development).

**Feedback Welcome:**
- We value your feedback! Your ideas help us continuously improve the mod.

**New Items and Blocks for Enhanced Creativity:**
- ATM in large and small sizes
- Grass block with grass on all sides
- Path blocks in two variants
- Sidewalk and red sidewalk
- MW and MR logos
- Radio (transceiver)
- Clapperboard
- Treated wood
- Mobile phone (Samsung/iPhone)
- New trapdoors
- New gravel and sand textures
- Cleanstone block
- Coffee and chocolate donut
- Gas pump and coffee machine
- Handcuffs and telephone
- Card reader and cash register
- Credit cards in various colors
- IDs (male/female)
- For Sale sign and pin board
- Vehicle spawner and garage
- VRS remover and documents
- Banknotes (1-500 Euro)

**New Commands:**
- /broadcast
- /gm
- /clean
- /ec
- /clear
- /god
- /fly
- /skull
- /tpall
- /head
- /day
- /night
- /sun
- /rain
- /thunder
- /heal
- /feed
- /rename
- /addlore
- /setlore
- /removelore
- /setspawn
- /spawn
- /tpa
- /tpaaccept
- /Tpadeny
- /Tpaall
- /setview
- /hunger
- /unbreakable
- /sudo
- /tphere
- /trash
- /vanish
- /warp
- /setwarp
- /delwarp
- /warprq
- /warps
- /money
- /eco

**And more!**

### Last Changelog Updated
- Version: V5.2
- Date: August 21, 2025

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
